business.headline: How best to tackle oil shock? Dr Sajjid Z Chinoy respondsIn an interview with India Today, Dr Sajjid Z Chinoy, Chief India Economist at JP Morgan, discussed the global energy shock and its impact on the Indian economy following the recent hikes in commercial LPG and anticipated domestic fuel price increases.

Not complying with trade deal: Trump hikes tariffs on cars, trucks from EU to 25%The move comes months after Trump and European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen agreed to a new trade deal in July 2025, which set a 15 per cent tariff on most goods, including automobiles and auto parts.

Petrol, diesel prices may be hiked by Rs 4-5 per litre, LPG by Rs 40-50: SourcesPetrol and diesel prices may increase by Rs four to five per litre, while domestic LPG cylinder prices could rise by Rs 40-50 per cylinder, according to government sources.

Fuel, LPG prices may go up, decision likely within 5-7 days: Government sourcesPetrol, diesel prices may rise by Rs 4–5 per litre and LPG by Rs 40–50 per cylinder, following a sharp jump in global crude oil prices driven by West Asia war.

Will your minimum pension rise from Rs 1,000 to Rs 7,500? Find out who benefitsPensioners across the country may soon see a shift in their monthly income if the proposed changes go through. Here's what we know so far and who could benefit.

8th Pay Commission to visit Hyderabad, Srinagar, Ladakh: What does this mean?The 8th Pay Commission is taking its discussions beyond Delhi, with visits planned to Hyderabad, Srinagar and Ladakh. But what does this outreach mean for government employees and pensioners awaiting revisions?

Paytm sees strong user trust and high merchant stickiness post PPBL actionBrokerage firms tracking the company said the RBI action on PPBL has limited direct impact on Paytm's core business operations, given the structural separation between the listed entity and the payments bank.

Earning Rs 50,000 a month? The right way to spend, save and investManaging money at Rs 50,000 a month isn't just about covering expenses, it's about making choices that shape your financial future. But are you allocating it in the right way?

From petrol to food, why could everything get costlier togetherA mix of higher oil prices, a weaker rupee and monsoon risks is putting pressure on India's economy. The overlap could lift household costs, limit policy choices and raise stagflation concerns.

GST at record Rs 2.43 lakh crore in April, but domestic demand growth slowsA major part of April's growth came from import-related revenues. GST collected on imports rose sharply by 25.8% to Rs 57,580 crore.

Workplace injury claims jump 31%: Are businesses doing enough?On Labour Day, as conversations around worker safety and rights take centre stage, a pressing question emerges—are businesses truly doing enough to protect their workforce? A recent report suggests concerns are growing.

Even the bank didn't help me: What victims face after reporting digital fraudFor part two of our series on Banking Risks in Digital India, I spoke to victims of digital fraud to understand what they experienced after being scammed. Their stories show how the aftermath can be just as distressing as the fraud itself.

Commercial LPG up by nearly Rs 1,000: Why have prices increased?Commercial LPG cylinder prices have risen again as global oil tensions keep costs elevated. The move shields households for now but raises pressure on restaurants, hotels and small businesses.

Maharashtra Day on May 1: Is the stock market open or closed today?The BSE and NSE are closed on May 1 for Maharashtra Day across key trading segments. Commodity derivatives will reopen in the evening, while traders should account for settlement and liquidity effects.

Commercial, mini LPG prices hiked by Rs 993 and Rs 261, no change in domestic ratesCommercial LPG cylinder prices have surged by Rs 993 to Rs 3,071.50 in Delhi, while domestic LPG, petrol, diesel, and kerosene rates remain unchanged to shield consumers.

Bajaj Finance raises FD rates up to 7.40%: Should you lock in now?The company has increased rates by up to 45 basis points, with the biggest jump seen in longer tenures. This means investors looking to park money for a few years could now earn better returns.

Markets end lower as crude stays high, rupee hits record lowMarkets closed lower on Thursday as high crude prices and a weak rupee weighed on sentiment. The slide highlighted persistent inflation and capital flow concerns, even as IT and pharma offered limited support.

Bajaj Finserv announces dividend, reports strong FY26 growthBajaj Finserv reported record FY26 income and profit and announced a special dividend with its Q4 results. The update also marked the completion of Allianz's stake exit, leaving its insurance businesses fully Bajaj-owned.

India-NZ FTA opens doors, but only prepared firms will benefitSiddharth Shankar says the India-New Zealand FTA offers big openings for trade and talent. He argues only firms with strong systems, compliance and execution will truly benefit.

8th Pay Commission: What worker bodies have demanded ahead of salary reviewWorker representatives laid out pay, pension and service demands in the first 8th Pay Commission meeting in Delhi. The staff side said the talks ended positively but pressed for wider consultation and more meetings.

entertainment.headline: Munawar Faruqui, wife Mehzabeen welcome first child Munawar Faruqui and Mehzabeen Faruqui have welcomed their first child together. The couple got married in May 2024.

Producer Firoz Nadiadwala files fraud case over Hera Pheri rights, claims extortion Film producer Firoz Nadiadwala has filed a fraud complaint in Mumbai over the copyright and remake rights of Hera Pheri. He has alleged an attempt to usurp his rights, extort money and disrupt his company's public listing.

Gladiators: Ajith Kumar's racing film first glimpse out on 55th birthday Ajith Kumar's racing film Gladiators – In Pursuit of Challenges unveiled its first glimpse on his 55th birthday. It brings his training and team to theatres while spotlighting his international motorsport campaign.

Raja Shivaji vs Ek Din vs Devil Wears Prada 2: Do holidays still aide box office? The May 1 holiday has split screens between Raja Shivaji, The Devil Wears Prada 2 and Ek Din. Trade experts say the date can lift openings, but audiences now decide a film's fate far faster.

Nandamuri Balakrishna's next announced with Devara director Koratala Siva Director Koratala Siva has announced a new film with Nandamuri Balakrishna, the producers confirmed. The move shifts attention from Siva's upcoming directorial, Devara: Part 2, starring Balakrishna's nephew, Jr NTR.

Diljit Dosanjh brings specially-abled fan on stage, sings Hass Hass for her Diljit Dosanjh brought a specially-abled fan on stage and sang Hass Hass for her during a recent concert in Canada. The video drew warm reactions online.

Hrithik Roshan's birthday poem for son Hridaan is love-wrapped in emotion Hrithik Roshan and Sussanne Khan shared special posts as their son Hridaan turned 18. Hrithik revived a 2021 poem that described his emotions as a proud father.

Swapped review: Netflix's animated film is lost in safe storytellingRelease Date:Fri May 01, 2026 Netflix's animated film Swapped follows Olly and Ivy after a magical plant forces them into each other's bodies. The film pairs handsome visuals and committed voice work with a body-swap story that stays resolutely safe.

Ram Charan's Peddi finally locks a release date in June. Read details here The makers of Peddi have announced June 2026 as the film's release window. Directed by Buchi Babu Sana, the film is headlined by Ram Charan and stars Janhvi Kapoor opposite him.

Glory review: A sports thriller that is ambitious, but not quite a knockoutRelease Date:Fri May 01, 2026 Glory, now streaming on Netflix, is a boxing drama that looks beyond the ring to explore family, ambition and inherited pressure. It blends strong performances with a layered story, but it isn't flawless.

Oscar winner's trophy goes missing after US airport security flags it as 'weapon' A Russian filmmaker's Oscar statuette was confiscated by US airport security, who deemed it a potential weapon, leading to its disappearance after being checked into Lufthansa's hold.

Sanjay Dutt's Aakhri Sawal trailer stuck with censor board a week before release The trailer of Sanjay Dutt's Aakhri Sawal is awaiting clearance from the censor board despite repeated revisions. With the film due in cinemas on May 8, the delay has left the makers anxious.

Raja Shivaji review: Riteish Deshmukh's grand ode has scale, needs sharper edgesRelease Date:Fri May 01, 2026 Riteish Deshmukh's Raja Shivaji stages Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj's rise with scale and conviction. The film draws strength from its action and performances, even as the screenplay lacks precision.

Allu Arjun's wife Sneha Reddy gives peek into actor's 44th birthday in April dump Sneha Reddy shared glimpses from Allu Arjun's intimate 44th birthday celebration in an April photo dump, pairing it with personal family moments that have delighted fans.

Ajith Kumar turns 55: Vivek Oberoi recalls touching Vivegam memory with his 'anna' On Ajith Kumar's 55th birthday, Vivek Oberoi recalled his warmth on the Vivegam set in Bulgaria, while Adhik Ravichandran shared an unseen Good Bad Ugly picture.

Vaibhav Gupta on Dhurandhar 2's Mann Atkeya: Manifested singing for Ranveer Singer Vaibhav Gupta, in an exclusive interview, talked about how he manifested his dream of singing for actor Ranveer Singh. He also recalled meeting the actor for the first time and shared how he landed the opportunity to sing Dhurandhar 2 song Mann Atkeya.

Ashutosh Gowariker named Festival Director for 57th IFFI in Goa Filmmaker Ashutosh Gowariker has been appointed Festival Director for the 57th International Film Festival of India in Goa. The move links his decades-long association with IFFI to his wider contribution to Indian cinema.

Britney Spears faces driving under influence charge. Can she avoid jail? Britney Spears has been charged in Ventura County with driving under the influence of alcohol and drugs after her March arrest. Prosecutors say a standard plea offer could spare her jail time if she accepts probation, classes and a fine.

Patriot review: Mammootty is invincible, Mohanlal-Fahadh Faasil boost spy dramaRelease Date:Fri May 01, 2026 Patriot movie review: Director Mahesh Narayanan's Patriot, starring Mammootty, Mohanlal and Fahadh Faasil, is a surveillance thriller that exposes the perils of spyware installed in civilians' tech devices. With intelligent writing and a grounded vision, it is spy cinema done right — minor shortcomings and all.

general news.headline: Repolling in 15 Bengal booths today; decision on Falta polling stations awaitedRepolling will be held on Saturday at 15 polling stations across Diamond Harbour and Magrahat Paschim Assembly constituencies in South 24 Parganas district following complaints of EVM tampering. Polling will take place from 7 am to 6 pm.

TMC goes to Supreme Court over EC's counting supervisor move, hearing todayThe TMC approached the Supreme Court against the Election Commission's decision to appoint only central government and PSU employees as counting supervisors and assistants for the May 4 vote count. The party sought an urgent hearing, which will take place on Saturday.

Fuel, LPG prices may go up, decision likely within 5-7 days: Government sourcesPetrol, diesel prices may rise by Rs 4–5 per litre and LPG by Rs 40–50 per cylinder, following a sharp jump in global crude oil prices driven by West Asia war.

Asking for things I can't agree to: Trump on Iran's fresh talks proposalGlobal oil prices, which remain well above $100 a barrel, had surged to a four-year high at one point on Thursday amid reports that Trump was to be briefed on plans for new military strikes to compel Iran to negotiate. Prices, however, eased following news of the fresh Iranian proposal.

Sooryavanshi shown no mercy: Kyle Jamieson gives fiery send-off to RR prodigyRR vs DC, IPL 2026: Kyle Jamieson's fiery send-off to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi stole the spotlight in Jaipur after the Delhi Capitals quick dismissed the Rajasthan Royals teenager with a sharp yorker.

Israel deployed Iron Beam laser system in UAE to destroy Iranian missilesIsrael deployed Iron Beam, Iron Dome and troops to the UAE during the conflict with Iran. The move pointed to a sharper expansion of Israel-UAE defence coordination after the Abraham Accords.

Offering namaz on public land not a right, rules Allahabad High CourtThe Allahabad High Court dismissed a plea seeking permission to offer namaz on public land in a village in Uttar Pradesh's Sambhal. It said religious freedom does not extend to using public land as a matter of right where public order and others' rights may be affected.

Watch: Madhya Pradesh CM launches helpline, rings as a caller. Then this happensChief Minister Mohan Yadav had just launched a free farmer helpline number, a service intended to ease the struggles of thousands of farmers across the state. However, it didn't take long for the carefully choreographed event to veer off course.

Ranchi boy, 7, sets world record by swimming across Palk Strait within 10 hoursThe Palk Strait, which lies between India and Sri Lanka, is challenging due to strong currents, sea waves, and unpredictable weather. However, Ishank Singh overcame these obstacles to swim the 29-kilometre stretch between Talaimannar in Sri Lanka and Dhanushkodi in Tamil Nadu.

Godrej Industries lays out 2031 growth ambitionsThe purpose statement, 'Crafting tomorrow since 1897', celebrates the Godrej Group's legacy while clearly positioning the new, refreshed Godrej Industries for the future.

Video shows final moments of mother clutching son before Jabalpur cruise capsizedA viral video shows a mother holding her four-year-old son moments before a cruise capsized in Madhya Pradesh's Jabalpur. Their bodies were later found wrapped in the same life jacket.

Advantage Trinamool? What turnout spike in Bengal's Muslim-dominated seats tellsCounting for the West Bengal Assembly elections will take place on Monday, May 4. Before the results, one clear trend has emerged. Voter turnout is up across all 85 Muslim-dominated seats in Murshidabad, Malda, Uttar Dinajpur, Birbhum, and South 24 Parganas. The big question heading into Monday: who does that surge belong to?
Munawar Faruqui, wife Mehzabeen welcome first childMunawar Faruqui and Mehzabeen Faruqui have welcomed their first child together. The couple got married in May 2024.

Hidden in cricket gloves and pads, cocaine worth Rs 1,745 crore seized in MumbaiThe NCB seized 349 kg of high-grade cocaine hidden in cricket gear during raids across Mumbai. The haul, among India's biggest, exposed a transnational network using warehouses and concealed transport systems.

Rough weather, no life jacket: Video shows moments before Jabalpur cruise tragedyA video shows tourists aboard the Bargi Dam cruise boat shortly before it overturned in strong winds in Jabalpur. The footage has sharpened focus on safety lapses as the death toll reached nine.

Rajiv Rudy's warm welcome for Ashwini Vaishnaw, Jitendra Singh while piloting flightFormer Union Minister and IndiGo pilot Rajiv Pratap Rudy gave Union Ministers Ashwini Vaishnaw, Jitendra Singh and other political figures a special welcome on the Jammu-Delhi flight. A video of the announcement was shared by Northern Railways on X.

Patriot review: Mammootty is invincible, Mohanlal-Fahadh Faasil boost spy dramaRelease Date:Fri May 01, 2026Patriot movie review: Director Mahesh Narayanan's Patriot, starring Mammootty, Mohanlal and Fahadh Faasil, is a surveillance thriller that exposes the perils of spyware installed in civilians' tech devices. With intelligent writing and a grounded vision, it is spy cinema done right — minor shortcomings and all.

More rain coming: May to witness above normal rainfall, confirms IMDThe IMD has forecast above-normal rainfall across India in May 2026, with storms in several regions. The outlook may ease heat stress but raises concerns over flooding and crop damage.

Not complying with trade deal: Trump hikes tariffs on cars, trucks from EU to 25%The move comes months after Trump and European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen agreed to a new trade deal in July 2025, which set a 15 per cent tariff on most goods, including automobiles and auto parts.

Who is Lorna Hajdini, the JPMorgan exec accused of using junior as 'sex slave'A former male employee has accused JPMorgan executive Lorna Hajdini of sexual abuse, coercion and racial harassment in a bombshell lawsuit. Hajdini has denied the allegations. However, this case has put spotlight on the 37-year-old Hajdini, who has been working with JPMorgan for 15 years.

Why Gujaratis worship this Yemeni islandAncient Indian mariners worshipped a Yemeni island and brought it back home as a deity. The island of Socotra, near East Africa, is believed to have manifested as Sikotar Mata, a sea goddess worshipped in Gujarat even today. Socotra was a vital refuge in the Arabian Sea for maritime traders, over 2,000 km from home.

Producer Firoz Nadiadwala files fraud case over Hera Pheri rights, claims extortionFilm producer Firoz Nadiadwala has filed a fraud complaint in Mumbai over the copyright and remake rights of Hera Pheri. He has alleged an attempt to usurp his rights, extort money and disrupt his company's public listing.

H-1B scam with ghost offices? IT firms among 30 entities to be probed by TexasTexas Attorney General Ken Paxton has launched a wide-ranging investigation into nearly 30 North Texas entities, including IT firms, alleging misuse of the H-1B visa programme through fake offices and dubious operations. This follows pressure from conservative activists and viral social media claims.

Riyan Parag's heroics in vain as Delhi Capitals break the shackles with record chaseIPL 2026, RR vs DC: Delhi Capitals snapped their three-match losing streak on Friday, beating the Rajasthan Royals by seven wickets in Jaipur after recording their highest run-chase in the history of the tournament.

sports.headline: Mumbai Indians trust Suryakumar Yadav: Coach Jayawardane backs struggling star Mahela Jayawardene has backed Suryakumar Yadav despite the batter's lean IPL 2026 run ahead of Mumbai Indians' match against Chennai Super Kings. With Mumbai ninth after two wins in eight matches, the side need a quick turnaround and are relying on senior players to deliver.

Riyan Parag unfazed after vaping row, says he does not have to answer critics RR vs DC, IPL 2026: Riyan Parag gave a defiant response following his side's defeat to Delhi Capitals in Jaipur. The RR captain believes that he is not answerable to his critics after his recent incident where he was seen vaping in the team dressing room.

Axar Patel dedicates DC win vs RR to fans who died in Delhi road accident Axar Patel dedicated Delhi Capitals' win over Rajasthan Royals to two fans killed in a road accident after the RCB match. The tribute followed DC's record chase in Jaipur and the captain emphasised on the personal loss felt by the franchise.

Riyan Parag's heroics in vain as Delhi Capitals break the shackles with record chase IPL 2026, RR vs DC: Delhi Capitals snapped their three-match losing streak on Friday, beating the Rajasthan Royals by seven wickets in Jaipur after recording their highest run-chase in the history of the tournament.

3 T20 World Cup winning captains in 1 frame: Dhoni, Rohit, Suryakumar reunite IPL 2026: MS Dhoni, Rohit Sharma and Suryakumar Yadav were photographed together during a practice session before the CSK vs MI match at Chepauk. The image drew attention as India's three T20 World Cup-winning captains head into IPL 2026 with injury and form concerns.

Jannik Sinner surpasses Big 3 to create history with Madrid Open final berth Jannik Sinner continued his dominant 2026 form by defeating Arthur Fils 6-2, 6-4 to reach the Madrid Open final, becoming the youngest player ever to qualify for the final of all nine ATP Masters 1000 tournaments.

Harshit Rana, Akash Deep expected to miss Afghanistan Test and England tour Akash Deep and Harshit Rana are unlikely to be fit for India's Afghanistan series and UK white-ball tour. Their rehabilitation is progressing, but August's Duleep Trophy looks a more realistic return point.

Riyan Parag puts vaping row behind, steps up with fiery 90 in RR vs DC IPL 2026: Riyan Parag anchored Rajasthan Royals with a composed 90 against Delhi Capitals after an early collapse. The innings shifted attention from his lean run and recent vaping controversy to his control under pressure.

Why MS Dhoni doesn't stay at venues in IPL 2026? Michael Hussey reveals IPL 2026, CSK vs MI: Michael Hussey revealed that MS Dhoni is not attending IPL 2026 matches at venues as he feels his presence could distract the team, with excessive crowd and media attention shifting focus away from CSK's performance.

Confused start, strong finish: How Lakshya Sen rallied back to beat Chou Tien-chen Lakshya Sen staged a gritty comeback to defeat Chou Tien-chen 18-21, 22-20, 21-17 in the Thomas Cup quarterfinal, recovering from a game down to give India a 1-0 lead. The win set the tone for India's 3-0 triumph over Chinese Taipei and semifinal qualification.

Sooryavanshi shown no mercy: Kyle Jamieson gives fiery send-off to RR prodigy RR vs DC, IPL 2026: Kyle Jamieson's fiery send-off to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi stole the spotlight in Jaipur after the Delhi Capitals quick dismissed the Rajasthan Royals teenager with a sharp yorker.

Starc makes IPL comeback for big RR vs DC clash, but David Miller pays the priceIPL 2026: Mitchell Starc returned for Delhi Capitals against Rajasthan Royals as Axar Patel confirmed three changes at the toss. His comeback and David Miller's tactical omission sharpened focus on Delhi's bid to stop their slide.

Riyan Parag vaping row: Ashwin sympathises, but says action was needed on RR skipperIPL 2026, RR vs DC: R Ashwin expressed empathy for Riyan Parag over the vaping incident during the RR vs PBKS IPL clash, but said the Rajasthan Royals skipper still deserved to be penalised for his actions.

Sunrisers Hyderabad rope in U19 star as injury replacement for Shivam MaviIPL 2026: Sunrisers Hyderabad signed India U19 all-rounder RS Ambrish as Shivam Mavi's replacement, with the teenager becoming their latest injury-enforced addition this season.

Lakshya Sen, Ayush Shetty star as India crush Chinese Taipei to reach semisThomas Cup 2026: India booked their place in the semifinals of the tournament with a dominant 3–0 victory over Chinese Taipei. Lakshya Sen and Ayush Shetty secured wins in their singles matches, while the doubles pair of Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty triumphed in their match to power India into the top four.

I promise you will be on the floor: SRH's Heinrich Klaasen warns fan over filming familyIPL 2026: A viral video showed Sunrisers Hyderabad batter Heinrich Klaasen warning a fan to stop filming him and his family over privacy concerns. The exchange stirred fresh debate over privacy, cameras in public spaces and the limits of fandom.

Homework hero: Why Ian Bishop goes beyond stats in IPL commentaryIPL 2026: Long before he steps into the IPL commentary box, Ian Bishop is already at work, piecing together stories from research and reportage to bring out the human journeys behind cricket's brightest talents.

F1 returns to Miami with Antonelli on rise and Verstappen's future in doubtMiami GP: Formula 1 returns to Miami with five pressing questions after an unscheduled spring break. Antonelli, Verstappen, Norris and the FIA all arrive under pressure in a season still rapidly taking shape.

India vs Chinese Taipei Highlights: Ayush beats Lin Chun-Yi, India storm to semisThomas Cup 2026 Highlights, India vs Chinese Taipei: Aysuh Shetty beats Lin Chun-Yi by 21-16, 21-17, and that seals India spot in the semi-finals. Previously, Satwik and Chirag gave India a 2-0 lead in the quarterfinals. They beat Chiu Hsiang Chieh and Wang Chi-Lin 23-21, 19-21, 21-12. Earlier, Lakshya Sen completed a comeback to beat Chinese Taipei's Chou Tien Chen 18-21, 22-20, 21-17.

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi turns weakness into strength when bowlers err: Ian BishopIPL 2026: Ian Bishop has argued that 15-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has the temperament and method to take on elite bowling in IPL 2026. As India debut talk builds, his record-breaking run for Rajasthan Royals is turning possibility into pressure.

Will Heinrich Klaasen make South Africa return? SRH star reacts to Pietersen remarkHeinrich Klaasen has ruled out a return to international cricket despite calls for a comeback. The South African says his focus is on franchise cricket, Rotterdam in the ETPL and staying mentally fresh.

Trump backs Iran's 2026 World Cup entry in USA after FIFA president's confirmationDonald Trump said he was fine with Iran playing their 2026 World Cup matches in the United States after Gianni Infantino confirmed FIFA's position. The decision keeps a politically charged schedule intact despite Tehran's venue concerns and its delegation's absence from FIFA Congress.

Not young anymore: Bhuvneshwar Kumar plays down Purple Cap milestone focuses on teamIPL 2026: Bhuvneshwar Kumar returned with figures of 3/28 against GT, taking his tally to 17 wickets from nine matches and regaining the Purple Cap as the tournament's leading wicket-taker.

After CSK jibe, Shubman Gill makes play bold dig at RCB with Virat Kohli pictureShubman Gill followed Gujarat Titans' win over Royal Challengers Bengaluru with an Instagram post praising Jason Holder and appearing to needle RCB. The post extended the night's playful edge, which also featured banter with Virat Kohli before the two embraced after the match.

RR vs DC Preview: Time for Riyan Parag to step up amidst myriad of controversiesRR vs DC Preview: Riyan Parag faces mounting pressure in Jaipur as Rajasthan Royals seek stability, while Delhi Capitals arrive searching for inspiration, clarity and a much-needed spark.

How has Holder filled the Hardik Pandya void for GT? Vikram Solanki explainsJason Holder's all-round display against Royal Challengers Bengaluru powered Gujarat Titans' win and earned warm praise from Vikram Solanki. As Gujarat push for the playoffs, Holder provides balance, experience and communication to fill the gap left by Hardik Pandya's exit in 2024.

IPL Play of the Day: Kohli, Rabada go blow for blow in Ahmedabad's main eventGT vs RCB, IPL Play of the Day: Virat Kohli and Kagiso Rabada traded early blows in Ahmedabad, with the RCB star's powerplay burst met by the GT pacer's sharp tactical adjustment and decisive comeback.

Can India outclass Taipei? All you need to know about Thomas Cup quartersThomas Cup 2026 quarterfinals: India will head into the last-eight tie against Chinese Taipei in Denmark with a slender edge. Lakshya Sen, Ayush Shetty and Kidambi Srikanth will play the singles matches for India on Friday. Here's all you need to know about the big quarterfinal tie.

Riyan Parag vaping row a reminder players need to maintain culture: SangakkaraKumar Sangakkara said Rajasthan Royals' recent controversies have been addressed internally, calling them a reminder for players to uphold team culture ahead of their clash against Delhi Capitals.

Gujarat scratching their heads over middle order woes? Rashid Khan opens upIPL 2026, GT vs RCB: Rashid Khan said Gujarat Titans should not overthink their inconsistent middle order, stressing that T20 cricket exposes every team's weaknesses. On Thursday, Rashid took two wickets as GT beat RCB by four wickets in Ahmedabad.

education.headline: The role of data analytics in modern advertising educationThis transformation also exercises a significant impact on the realm of 'advertising education.'

NCERT deletes Azad Pak, adds China's aggression reference in Class 12 textbookThe NCERT has made final changes to its Class 12 Political Science textbook syllabus for the upcoming academic year, including a revision in reference to India's border situation with China, Azad Pakistan, Article 370 and more.

NEET row: Bihar cops find 6 post-dated cheques 'issued for question paper brokers'Six post-dated cheques which were suspected to have been issued in favour of mafia demanding over Rs 30 lakh from each candidate seeking alleged leaked question paper ahead of NEET held last month were recovered by Bihar Police.

Forest fires surge tenfold from 2004 to 2017: Causes, impact and preventionAmidst a relentless surge, intense forest fires are now multiplying tenfold, casting a menacing shadow over our flora and fauna. Year by year, their fiery grip tightens, threatening ecosystems far and wide, now extending their reach to impact human lives.

Fresh plea in Supreme Court to recall NEET results, reconduct examsA fresh petition has been filed in the Supreme Court to recall the National Entrance cum Eligibility Test - Under Graduate (NEET-UG) 2024 results and re-conduct fresh examination after discrepancies in the declared results.

NTA issues clarification after NEET result controversy over toppers, high cut-offIn a detailed statement, the National Testing Agency (NTA) said that the increase in cut-off and number of toppers in the NEET-UG reflect the competitive nature of the exam and maintained that the test's integrity has not been compromised.

Exclusive: Arvind Kejriwal claims 'BJP succession war, PM backing Amit Shah'Speaking exclusively to India Today TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal claimed that there is a "succession war" within the BJP. He also claimed that the ruling party is "not fighting the Lok Sabha elections as a team".

4 medical students arrested in Bihar for appearing as proxies for NEET aspirantsFour MBBS students who appeared in place of NEET aspirants in the medical entrance exam were detained in Bihar's Purnea.

NEET-UG question paper not leaked, claims baseless: National Testing AgencyThe reports claiming question paper leak in the medical entrance exam NEET-UG are "completely baseless and without any ground", the National Testing Agency (NTA) has clarified.
The generation with answers: Tech-savvy Indian youth tackling global challengesIndia's tech-savvy youth rewriting the global narrative, one solution at a time.

Left sweeps JNU students' polls, Dhananjay is first Dalit presidentThe Left swept the Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls, winning all four posts and trouncing the RSS-affiliated ABVP. The ABVP was leading at one point, but the Left eventually surged ahead and emerged victorious.
The power of knowledge: Education's influence on real estate market trendsIn a dynamic sector like real estate, investing in continuing education is not simply an option; it is a requirement.

JNU students' body election on March 22 after 4 yearsThe Jawaharlal Nehru University Students' Union (JNUSU) polls will take place on March 22, more than four years after the last elections were held in September 2019.

UP 12th board exam math, biology papers leaked on WhatsApp, complaint filedThe mathematics and biology question papers for the Uttar Pradesh class 12 board exam were allegedly leaked on a WhatsApp group.

UP Police Constable recruitment exam cancelled days after paper leakThe Uttar Pradesh Police Constable recruitment exam held on February 17 and 18 was canceled due to a paper leak. The Chief Minister has announced a re-examination within the next six months.
